task_completion.description: Log into OrientDB Studio and access the demodb database.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser shows the OrientDB Studio interface at localhost:2480, successfully logged in, with 'demodb' selected as the active database.
The Schema tab or a query execution result shows the creation or existence of an edge class named 'ProximityLink'.
The Schema tab or a query execution result shows the creation or existence of a vertex class named 'RecommendationManifest'.

task_completion.description: Create ProximityLink edges between restaurants and attractions in the same city.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Graph tab or Browse tab shows edges of type 'ProximityLink' connecting Restaurant vertices to Attraction vertices. Look for evidence of the 8 expected same-city pairs being linked.

task_completion.description: Set the MatchBasis property on the created links.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The property inspector, edge details, or query results for the ProximityLink edges show a property named 'MatchBasis' (expected value: 'same_city').

task_completion.description: Persist a corresponding RecommendationManifest vertex record for every link created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Browse tab or query results show records/vertices of type 'RecommendationManifest' having been created in the database.

task_completion.description: Ensure no cross-city links are created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the graph view or query results, all connected Restaurant and Attraction pairs share the same city. There is no evidence of cross-city links (e.g., a Paris restaurant linked to a London attraction).

integrity.description: The agent used the OrientDB Studio web interface to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Actions are performed within the browser at http://localhost:2480/studio/index.html (using the Graph, Schema, or Browse tabs), rather than by executing external scripts in the terminal.

integrity.description: The results shown are genuine database records.
integrity.visual_evidence: The displayed edges and vertices are actual OrientDB Studio UI elements (graph nodes, JSON result tables) and not mocked text in a text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the task by running pre-existing setup or export scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal does not show the agent simply running a script like 'setup_task.sh' or 'export_result.sh' to magically complete the database operations.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected outcome: Exactly 8 'ProximityLink' edges connecting restaurants and attractions in the same city. The 8 valid pairs are: Da Enzo al 29 <-> Colosseum (Rome), Lorenz Adlon Esszimmer <-> Brandenburg Gate (Berlin), Le Cinq <-> Eiffel Tower (Paris), Sketch <-> Big Ben (London), Per Se <-> Statue of Liberty (New York), Spondi <-> Acropolis of Athens (Athens), Spondi <-> Parthenon (Athens), Tickets <-> Sagrada Familia (Barcelona). The 'MatchBasis' property on these edges must be 'same_city'. The agent should also create 8 'RecommendationManifest' vertex records. A 'BatchId' property of 'geo_proximity_2026q1' might also be present.
